The user wants me to create a prompt for VEO 3.1 (Google's video generation AI) to create an 8-second professional realistic advertisement video with audio, voice, music for their Aurora App. They've attached an image of their "Aurora App actress" - a character with purple hair wearing a purple "Aurora App" branded jacket.

Let me first fetch information about VEO 3.1 to understand its prompt requirements and capabilities better.Now let me fetch the prompt guide from DeepMind to get specific prompting best practices: Based on VEO 3.1's capabilities and best practices for prompting, here's your professional **8-second advertising video prompt** referencing your Aurora App actress:

---

## 🎬 VEO 3.1 Prompt for Aurora App Advertisement (8 seconds)

**Upload the attached reference image as CHARACTER REFERENCE, then use this prompt:**

---

> **PROFESSIONAL ADVERTISEMENT | 8 SECONDS | CINEMATIC**
>
> A young woman with vibrant purple bob hair, wearing a purple bomber jacket with "Aurora App" embroidered on the chest, stands confidently in a modern, sunlit urban plaza. She smiles warmly at camera, pulls out her smartphone and taps the screen. 
>
> **Camera:** Smooth dolly-in from medium shot to close-up on her face.
>
> **Lighting:** Golden hour, soft natural light with subtle lens flare.
>
> **Audio/Voice:** She speaks directly to camera with a friendly, enthusiastic voice: *"Aurora App — connecting people who care."*
>
> **Sound Design:** Uplifting electronic ambient music with a soft synth pad, subtle whoosh transition sound as she raises her phone, gentle notification chime accent.
>
> **Mood:** Inspiring, modern, tech-forward, inclusive, empowering.
>
> **Style:** High-end brand commercial, shallow depth of field, cinematic color grading with purple and gold tones matching brand identity.
>
> **End Frame:** She winks confidently as the Aurora App logo gently fades in at bottom right corner with a soft glow effect.

---

### 📋 Key Settings for VEO 3.1:
| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| **Duration** | 8 seconds |
| **Character Reference** | Upload the attached actress image |
| **Audio** | Native (enabled) |
| **Style** | Cinematic / Commercial |
| **Camera Control** | Dolly-in |

---

This prompt leverages VEO 3.1's **native audio generation** (dialogue + music + sound effects), **character consistency** via reference image, and **cinematic camera controls** for a polished professional advertisement. 🎥✨

She is filming a livestream in Bogotá, Colombia, during "Noche de Velitas" (Little Candles Day).

Action & Camera: The camera is handheld, selfie-style, slightly shaky to mimic a real phone livestream. She is crouching slightly near the ground at the start, holding a lit candle, then stands up smiling to talk to the camera. She maintains eye contact with the lens throughout. Lip-sync is perfect and starts at second 0. Audio Prompt: A young, female voice with a friendly, soft Colombian accent speaking in Spanish. High-quality microphone simulation (livestream audio). Dialogue: "¡Hola desde Bogotá! 🕯️ En esta noche de velitas, encendemos una luz por un internet seguro. En Aurora App tú eres la prioridad. ¡Felices fiestas!"

Environment: It is night. The street is lined with hundreds of small lit candles and paper lanterns on the sidewalk. In the background, there is a blurry view of Bogota's brick architecture and festive yellow string lights.

Lighting: The scene is lit by the warm, flickering glow of the candles from below, illuminating her face with amber tones, contrasting with the cool blue moonlight of the city night. High fidelity, cinematic depth of field, 8k resolution.

Background Sound: Subtle crackling of candles, distant cheerful city murmur, faint traditional holiday music.

Let me craft this improved prompt.## 🎬 VEO 3.1 Prompt — Aurora App Advertisement (8 Seconds)

**Upload the attached reference image as CHARACTER REFERENCE, then use this prompt:**

---

> **PROFESSIONAL ADVERTISEMENT | 8 SECONDS | VERTICAL 9:16 | CINEMATIC REALISM**
>
> **Character:** A young woman with vibrant short purple bob hair, wearing a purple bomber jacket with "Aurora App" embroidered on the chest. Natural makeup, expressive brown eyes, warm genuine smile.
>
> **Scene:** She films a selfie-style video in a modern Bogotá coworking space at golden hour. Large windows behind her reveal the city skyline with distant green mountains. She holds her phone steady, maintaining perfect eye contact with the lens throughout.
>
> **Action & Camera:** Handheld selfie-style, slightly dynamic but stable. She begins with a friendly wave, then speaks directly to camera with natural hand gestures. Subtle camera tilt as she emphasizes key words. Lip-sync is perfect and begins at second 0.
>
> **Voice & Dialogue:** A young Colombian woman's voice, authentic Bogotá rolo accent, warm and confident tone, clear enunciation with natural cadence. High-quality microphone audio.
>
> **Spanish Script:**
> *"¡Hola! Soy parte de Aurora App, la red social donde tú eres la prioridad. Conéctate con personas que de verdad importan. ¡Descárgala ya!"*
>
> **Lighting:** Warm golden hour sunlight streaming through windows, soft natural fill light on face, subtle rim light separating her from background. Cinematic depth of field with bokeh on cityscape.
>
> **Music & Sound Design:** Uplifting lo-fi electronic beat with Colombian cumbia-inspired subtle percussion undertones. Soft ambient city sounds. Gentle notification "ding" accent when she says "Aurora App". Music fades gracefully at end.
>
> **Mood & Style:** Authentic, empowering, youthful, tech-forward. High-end social media brand commercial aesthetic. 8K resolution, cinematic color grading with warm amber and purple brand tones.
>
> **End Frame:** She winks and gives a thumbs up as the Aurora App logo subtly appears bottom-center with a soft purple glow.

Aurora App is a **non-profit Global Safety Intelligence Platform for women** with features like panic buttons, safe routes, AI companion, community circles, and the world's first women-first search engine. ## 🎬 VEO 3.1 Prompt — Aurora App Professional Advertisement (8 Seconds)

**Upload the attached reference image as CHARACTER REFERENCE, then use this prompt:**

---

> **PROFESSIONAL ADVERTISEMENT | 8 SECONDS | VERTICAL 9:16 | CINEMATIC REALISM**
>
> **Character:** A young woman with vibrant short purple bob hair, wearing a purple bomber jacket with "Aurora App" embroidered on the chest. Natural makeup, warm genuine smile, expressive eyes radiating confidence and trust.
>
> **Scene:** She films a selfie-style video in a cozy, modern Bogotá café with exposed brick walls and warm string lights. Morning sunlight streams through large windows, revealing the Andes mountains in the soft background bokeh. A smartphone and coffee cup sit on the rustic wooden table beside her.
>
> **Action & Camera:** Handheld selfie-style, intimate and authentic. She looks directly at camera with genuine warmth, uses natural hand gestures for emphasis. Subtle camera movement follows her energy. Perfect lip-sync starting at second 0.
>
> **Voice & Dialogue:** A young Colombian woman's voice, authentic warm Bogotá rolo accent, friendly and empowering tone, clear enunciation with natural conversational cadence. High-quality microphone audio.
>
> **Spanish Script (Bogotá Colombian accent):**
> *"¡Hola, hermana! ¿Sabías que Aurora App es la primera red social creada por mujeres, para mujeres? Mapa de seguridad, botón de pánico, comunidad real. Entra gratis en miaurora.app — ¡Te esperamos!"*
>
> **Lighting:** Golden morning light from windows, warm amber fill on face, soft rim light. Cinematic shallow depth of field with beautiful café bokeh behind her.
>
> **Music & Sound Design:** Uplifting lo-fi electronic beat with subtle Colombian vallenato-inspired undertones (soft accordion hint). Gentle ambient café sounds (distant coffee machine, soft murmur). Musical accent when she says "Aurora App" and a soft chime on "miaurora.app". Music gracefully fades at end.
>
> **Mood & Style:** Authentic, empowering, sisterly, welcoming. High-end social impact brand commercial. 8K resolution, cinematic color grading with warm golden tones and Aurora purple accents matching brand identity.
>
> **End Frame:** She gives a warm, inviting smile and subtle nod as the Aurora App logo (purple with aurora gradient) elegantly fades in at bottom-center with the URL "miaurora.app" beneath it.

---

### 🗣️ Script Breakdown (Timed for 8 Seconds)

| Segundo | Acción | Diálogo |

| 1.5-3.5s | Points to self, then camera | *"¿Sabías que Aurora App es la primera red social creada por mujeres, para mujeres?"* |
| 3.5-5.5s | Counts with fingers | *"Mapa de seguridad, botón de pánico, comunidad real."* |

### 💜 Why This Prompt Works for Aurora's Mission:

| Element | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **"Hermana"** | Creates sisterhood bond — core Aurora value |
| **"Creada por mujeres, para mujeres"** | Highlights non-profit women-first mission |
| **"Mapa de seguridad, botón de pánico"** | Features the FREE safety tools (panic button, safety map) |
| **"Comunidad real"** | Emphasizes authentic community vs toxic social media |
| **"Entra gratis en miaurora.app"** | Direct CTA to the website (NOT an app store) |
| **"¡Te esperamos!"** | Welcoming, inclusive invitation to join |

---

This prompt leverages **VEO 3.1's native audio** (Colombian Bogotá accent + music + sound design), **character consistency** from reference image, and communicates Aurora App's **non-profit mission** of women's safety and community — driving traffic to **miaurora.app** 🇨🇴💜✨

The user is getting a policy violation from VEO 3.1. This could be triggered by several things:
1. The "panic button" / "botón de pánico" - emergency/safety terms might trigger safety filters
2. Specific brand names or URLs
3. The detailed character description referencing the attached image
4. Overly complex prompts

Let me create a simpler, policy-compliant prompt that avoids potential trigger words while still being effective for Aurora App.The prompt likely triggered VEO's content policy filters due to terms like "botón de pánico" (panic button), emergency-related content, or the complexity of brand-specific requests. Let me create a **policy-compliant version**:

---

## 🎬 VEO 3.1 Prompt — Aurora App Advertisement (8 Seconds) — POLICY-SAFE VERSION

**Upload the attached reference image as CHARACTER REFERENCE, then use this prompt:**

---

> A young woman with short purple bob hair and a purple jacket films a cheerful selfie video in a cozy café with warm string lights and morning sunlight. She speaks directly to camera in Spanish with a friendly Colombian accent, smiling warmly throughout.
>
> She says enthusiastically: "¡Hola! Soy Aurora, tu comunidad online. Conecta con mujeres increíbles, descubre lugares seguros y crece junto a nosotras. Visítanos en nuestra web. ¡Te esperamos!"
>
> The scene has golden morning light, shallow depth of field with café bokeh. Upbeat electronic lo-fi music plays softly in the background with gentle café ambient sounds. She ends with a warm smile and wave.
>
> Cinematic quality, vertical 9:16 format, 8 seconds.

---

### 🔄 Alternative Simplified Prompts (Try These If Above Fails):

**Option A — Ultra Simple:**
> A cheerful young woman with purple hair and purple jacket talks to camera in a cozy café. She speaks Spanish with Colombian accent, smiling warmly: "¡Hola! Únete a Aurora, la comunidad para mujeres. Conecta, comparte y crece con nosotras. ¡Te esperamos!" Warm golden lighting, upbeat music, vertical video, 8 seconds.

**Option B — Even Shorter:**
> Young woman with purple bob hair in purple jacket, selfie-style video in sunny café. She smiles and speaks Spanish: "¡Hola! Soy parte de Aurora, donde las mujeres se apoyan. ¡Únete gratis!" Warm lighting, happy lo-fi music, 8 seconds, vertical format.

**Option C — Minimal (Most Likely to Pass):**
> A friendly young woman with purple hair waves at camera in a café, speaking Spanish happily: "¡Hola amigas! Únete a nuestra comunidad Aurora. ¡Te esperamos!" Warm lighting, cheerful music, 8 seconds.

---

### ⚠️ What Was Removed to Comply with Policy:

| Removed Element | Reason |
|-----------------|--------|
| "Botón de pánico" / Panic button | Emergency terms can trigger safety filters |
| "Mapa de seguridad" / Safety map | Safety/security terms may flag content |
| Specific URLs (miaurora.app) | Brand URLs sometimes trigger commercial filters |
| Detailed technical specs (8K, lip-sync) | Overly specific requests can cause issues |
| "Logo fade-in" requests | Graphic overlay requests may be blocked |
| Long structured prompts | Simpler prompts work better with VEO |

---

### 💡 Tips for VEO 3.1 Success:

1. **Keep it conversational** — Write prompts like you're describing a scene to a friend
2. **Avoid safety/emergency terms** — Use positive framing like "community" and "connect"
3. **No specific URLs or logos** — Add these in post-production
4. **Shorter is better** — VEO works best with 2-4 sentence prompts
5. **Focus on emotion** — "cheerful", "warm", "friendly" work great

---

Try **Option C** first — if it works, gradually add elements back. The key is the actress with purple hair in purple jacket speaking Spanish with Colombian accent about a women's community. 💜

---

### ✅ VERSION 1 — Following Official VEO Examples

> A young woman with short purple hair and a purple jacket sits in a sunny café with warm string lights. She looks directly at camera, smiling warmly, and speaks in Spanish with a Colombian accent: "¡Hola! Bienvenida a nuestra comunidad. Aquí las mujeres nos conectamos, compartimos y crecemos juntas. ¡Únete!" Warm golden morning light streams through windows. Soft ambient café sounds and upbeat lo-fi music play gently. Portrait 9:16 format.

### ✅ VERSION 2 — Dialogue-Focused (Based on VEO's Dialogue Example)

> Close-up shot of a cheerful young woman with purple bob hair in a cozy café, golden sunlight streaming through windows. She speaks warmly to camera in Spanish: "¡Hola amigas! Esta es nuestra comunidad, un lugar donde las mujeres nos apoyamos. ¡Las espero!" Ambient café sounds, distant chatter, soft upbeat music. Warm tones, shallow depth of field.

### ✅ VERSION 3 — Ultra Minimal (Most Likely to Pass)

### ✅ VERSION 4 — Cinematic Style (Based on VEO "Man on Phone" Example)

> A close-up cinematic shot follows a friendly young woman with vibrant purple bob hair as she speaks to camera in a sunlit café bathed in golden morning light. She smiles warmly and says in Spanish with a soft Colombian accent: "¡Hola! Somos una comunidad de mujeres. Aquí nos apoyamos, nos conectamos y crecemos juntas." The shallow depth of field focuses on her expressive face, blurring the cozy café background into warm amber tones. Gentle lo-fi music and soft café ambiance.

---

### 📋 Settings

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| **Duration** | 8 seconds |
| **Aspect Ratio** | 9:16 |
| **Reference Image** | Upload actress image with `reference_type="asset"` |
| **Negative Prompt** | "low quality, blurry, distorted face, cartoon" |

### 🚫 What to Avoid (Based on VEO Policy)

| ❌ Blocked | ✅ Safe Alternative |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Brand names in prompt | Remove "Aurora App" from spoken text |
| URLs (miaurora.app) | Add in post-production |
| Emergency terms (panic, safety) | Use "community", "support", "connect" |
| Logo requests | Add overlay in video editor |
| Overly long prompts | Keep under 150 words |

---

**Try VERSION 3 first** — it's the simplest and most likely to pass filters. If successful, gradually try VERSION 2 or 4 for more cinematic quality. Add the Aurora App branding, logo, and URL in post-production video editing. 💜

Let me craft THE ONE SHOT prompt that maximizes every element.## 🎬 THE ONE SHOT — VEO 3.1 Maximum Production Value (8 Seconds)

**Upload your actress reference image as CHARACTER REFERENCE, then copy this exact prompt:**

---

```
Close-up portrait shot of a young woman with short purple bob hair wearing a purple jacket. She sits in a cozy café with warm string lights and morning sunlight streaming through windows behind her. She looks directly at camera with genuine warmth, waves gently, and speaks in Spanish with a friendly Colombian accent:

"¡Hola! Soy parte de una comunidad increíble de mujeres. Nos conectamos, nos apoyamos y crecemos juntas. ¿Vienes?"

She ends with an inviting smile and subtle head tilt.

Golden hour lighting illuminates her face with warm amber tones. Shallow depth of field blurs the café background into soft bokeh. 

Audio: Soft upbeat lo-fi music with gentle piano melody plays throughout. Ambient café sounds include distant coffee machine hum and soft murmur. Her voice is clear and warm, recorded quality.

Cinematic, vertical 9:16, 8 seconds.
```

---

### 🎯 Why This Prompt Maximizes Your 8 Seconds:

| Element | What It Does |
|---------|--------------|
| **"Close-up portrait"** | Keeps focus on actress, better lip-sync |
| **"looks directly at camera"** | Creates connection with viewer |
| **Dialogue in quotes** | VEO's exact format for speech generation |
| **"friendly Colombian accent"** | Specifies the Bogotá voice you want |
| **"¿Vienes?"** | Ends with engaging question CTA |
| **"inviting smile"** | Gives clear end action for the 8s |
| **"Golden hour + shallow depth"** | Professional cinematic look |
| **"Soft upbeat lo-fi + piano"** | Specifies exact music mood |
| **"Ambient café sounds"** | Adds realistic audio layer |
| **"recorded quality"** | Signals clean voice audio |

---

### 📝 Spanish Script Timing (Fits 8 Seconds Perfectly):

| Time | Visual | Audio |
|------|--------|-------|
| 0-1s | Wave, smile | *"¡Hola!"* + music starts |
| 1-5s | Speaks warmly, hand gestures | *"Soy parte de una comunidad increíble de mujeres. Nos conectamos, nos apoyamos y crecemos juntas."* |
| 5-7s | Leans slightly forward | *"¿Vienes?"* |
| 7-8s | Inviting smile, head tilt | Music softens, café ambiance |

---

```
Cinematic close-up of a young woman with short purple bob hair and purple jacket. She films a selfie-style video at night surrounded by warm golden Christmas lights and flickering candles. Her face glows with amber candlelight from below, contrasting with cool blue moonlight. She smiles radiantly at camera and speaks in Spanish with a warm Colombian accent:

"¡Feliz Nochebuena! Este año búscate a ti misma. Un buscador creado por mujeres, una comunidad que te cuida. Este es tu momento. ¡Feliz Navidad!"

She blows a gentle kiss to camera and winks.

Background: Bokeh of hundreds of small lit candles and golden string lights. Distant sounds of Colombian Christmas music, soft laughter, and crackling candles. Uplifting orchestral music with warm strings swells gently. Her voice is intimate and clear.

Vertical 9:16, cinematic, 8 seconds.
```
